title: Add explicit less-than constraint for expiry checks in AgentPolicy

artifacts.description: Add LessThan(64) component 'isNotExpired' with currentTimestamp < expiryTimestamp enforced as isNotExpired.out === 1
Add LessThan(64) component enforcing delegateeExpiry <= delegatorExpiry inside the SNARK
Unit tests: valid unexpired credential passes, expired credential fails proof generation, boundary condition currentTimestamp === expiryTimestamp fails
Unit tests: delegatee expiry exceeding delegator expiry fails, equal expiry passes, delegatee expiry strictly less passes
Audit and remove any redundant Solidity-side expiry re-check that was compensating for missing circuit constraint; ensure public signals include both timestamps
Document which expiry/ordering invariants are enforced in-circuit vs on-chain, rationale for in-circuit enforcement, and constraint cost breakdown

steps: Audit AgentPolicy.circom fully: confirm whether LessThan(64) for currentTimestamp < expiryTimestamp is present or absent; document finding
Audit Delegation.circom fully: confirm whether delegateeExpiry <= delegatorExpiry is enforced inside the SNARK or only in Solidity
In AgentPolicy.circom, instantiate component isNotExpired = LessThan(64); wire isNotExpired.in[0] <== currentTimestamp; isNotExpired.in[1] <== expiryTimestamp; add constraint isNotExpired.out === 1

In Delegation.circom, instantiate component delegExpValid = LessThan(64) (or LessEqThan(64)); wire delegExpValid.in[0] <== delegateeExpiry; delegExpValid.in[1] <== delegatorExpiry; add constraint delegExpValid.out === 1
Confirm both currentTimestamp and expiryTimestamp are declared as public signals in AgentPolicy so verifier contracts can observe them if needed
Recompile circuits with circom, regenerate R1CS and witness generation code, verify new constraint counts match expectation (~130 additional constraints per LessThan(64))
Re-run trusted setup or update proving/verification keys for affected circuits
Write failing tests first: craft witness inputs where currentTimestamp >= expiryTimestamp and assert proof generation fails; then confirm fix makes them pass
Write failing tests for Delegation: delegateeExpiry > delegatorExpiry must fail; delegateeExpiry === delegatorExpiry must pass
Audit AgentPolicyVerifier.sol and DelegationVerifier.sol: remove or document any Solidity-side expiry checks that were compensating for the missing circuit constraint
Update specs/expiry-constraint-audit.md with invariant table, constraint costs, and rationale
Run full test suite; confirm no regressions
dependencies: snarkjs for R1CS recompilation and key regeneration
Existing AgentPolicy.circom and Delegation.circom source files
Trusted setup ceremony artifacts (must be redone or updated after circuit changes)
